message:
feat(fcp-sdk): expand runtime with async executor and lifecycle hooks

SDK runtime enhancements:

runtime.rs (+202 lines):
- Async runtime configuration: tokio runtime builder customization
- Worker thread management: CPU affinity, thread naming, panic handling
- Lifecycle hooks: pre-start, post-start, pre-shutdown, post-shutdown
- Graceful shutdown: signal handling, drain period, force termination
- Health endpoint: /health, /ready with configurable checks
- Metrics endpoint: Prometheus exposition format, custom collectors
- Configuration loading: environment variables, config files, defaults
- Feature flag integration: runtime toggles, gradual rollout
- Hot reload support: configuration refresh without restart
- Resource pooling: connection pools, buffer caches, object pools

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
